name: CKH Food & Health Limited
summary: CKH Food & Health Limited manufactures and distributes health foods. It primarily offers Chinese medicine based health supplements in capsule, refined, drink, and tea forms. The company was formerly known as China King-Highway Holdings Limited and changed its name to CKH Food & Health Limited in 2013. CKH Food & Health Limited was founded in 2009 and is based in George Town, the Cayman Islands.
